points: Contributing to Juspay's core Haskell-based backend powering payment flows at scale — resolving production issues, tracing bugs through distributed service boundaries, and improving system reliability.

Developed a cross-platform PureScript SDK enabling shared, type-safe business logic across Android and iOS for Card-Not-Present (CNP) payments and MFA flows — reducing platform-specific duplication significantly.
Developed Visa Pay iOS features (Swift/SwiftUI) — virtual card generation, wallet creation, and Scan-to-Pay.
Integrated REST APIs and built reusable UI components for seamless in-app user experience.
Wrote unit tests, structured logging, and error handling for critical payment flows to improve reliability and debuggability.
Participated in internal Haskell training bootcamp to understand functional programming concepts and patterns.
Developed a responsive website with 6+ pages using the MERN stack.
Led the Single Window Clearance System for the Government of Himachal Pradesh, reducing processing time by 40% and increasing new business registrations by 25%.
Acquired expertise in Supervised, Reinforcement, and Unsupervised Learning.
Ranked among the top 3000 nationwide in the ML Summer School competition.
